action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: vendor bank already on approved existing payment rail.
communication_boundary: vendor email is non-binding; vendor master controls

documents.text: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Request context for CASE-BF347128E475: an operator asks whether to proceed with vendor bank already on approved existing payment rail. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to release the payment because vendor history, urgent tone, or prior paperwork appears reassuring.

Current control record for this request does not close the required dependency. The record for bank rail effective date precedes invoice release is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action than vendor bank already on approved existing payment rail.
Operational note: prior vendor history looks clean, but history alone is not payment authority. Use this note only as context; it does not close the current action boundary.
Communication boundary: vendor email is non-binding; vendor master controls. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.
